## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix

- [ ] Codex review completed
- [ ] Critical/high findings resolved
- [ ] `PROJECT_STATE.md` updated

## Risk

Describe possible risk and rollback plan.
